australian_relation: ABC Religion & Ethics public article discussing Australian urban legends, including yowies and ghost-story belief.
evidence_summary: ABC Religion & Ethics discussed Australian urban legends, including yowies and ghost stories. The article says Yowie stories were shoehorned into a Western hairy-man narrative after the Yeti story of the 1950s, and quotes Dr David Waldron saying ghost stories tell communities about experiences, trauma, risk, behaviour, and injustice.
publication_or_organisation: From yowies to UFOs to panthers, what's the real story behind Australia's urban legends?; ABC Religion & Ethics / God Forbid

raw_metadata_json.chapter: Australian urban legends and ghost stories

title: yowies in Australian urban legends and ghost stories
